- `access_key` (string) - S3 configuration options

- `secret_key` (string) - The AWS secret key used to sign requests

- `region` (string) - The AWS region where the S3 bucket is located

- `manifest` (string) - The path to a manifest file to update with the exported image

- `s3_key` (string) - The S3 key (path) where the image will be stored
